creator: social@brandongrows.me
text:
Created attachment 249748
New port patch

The version used in Ren'Py Visual Novel engine (games/renpy) is about three years old. This library gets updates every few months and has recently added bindings for:

* LUA
* C#
* dll
* Fortran
* Pascal
* R

I opted for making those a part of the docs instead of separate individual ports in case others would want to use them for their ports but didn't see the need to split them up since they may get updates with the main library.
